prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response:
*Yes, a brief review of a wake or no wake experience.

The review agreed to wake up upon the delivery of a new pair of pants, that's all the shadowy figures in the marketplace demanded. [Wordsmith did a quick check to confirm that no one in the marketplace currently sells shoes or pants.] In the morning, while getting dressed, he accidentally walked out his front door and into the yard before he even put on his shoes and his new pants. He then walked back into his bedroom to put them on. When he did this, he realized he was wearing shoes that he didn't recall owning. He spent a few minutes looking through the assets that had been transferred to his account in the recent order update, and found no shoes currently residing in his wardrobe. He concluded that the encounter must have happened during the night, when the details of the latest items to be added to his wardrobe were being finalized. He then spent the afternoon sunbathing at the beach and returned to his home in the late afternoon to find the new pants already sitting in his closet along with the shoes he had just discovered in the early morning.

When he later mentioned this to the Keeper of the assets that make up the control and data pipes in the city, the person replied, "That's a bit of a stretch. I could find that information." The data for the assets comes from the official city data catalogue, which lists the many different things that make up the city. When he asked for clarification, the person was ready to bring up the data catalogue in the maps he had studied. What he found was an entry for each of the city's top hotels, with data on hotels' physical assets and the data pipeline. He scanned the list of top hotels and found the same information that he remembered encountering a few months ago. He then asked the data analyst to pull up the record from that time, and saw the same details that he recalled, with some branding elements that he had not recalled. He concluded his brief review of the main points of this incremental order update by stating, "The account immediately looked more consistent. That means this review was just a fleeting thought. I won't claim any more details on the situation."duration="1:01"]
